name: Reënboogrant
overview: Buckle up for an exhilarating rollercoaster ride through the world of authentic teenage drama, family conflicts, love, aspirations and fierce rivalries. An adaption based on Louise van Niekerk's gripping coming-of-age book series.

trailers.title: It's all about contrast | Reënboogrant S1 Tease Trailer | Showmax Original
